prerequisites: A Piwik account with access to the data you want to extract.
Permission to create API credentials in your Piwik user profile.
A generated API key, which produces the client_id and client_secret pair. The client secret is shown only at creation time, so copy it before closing the window.
The organization_id value that identifies your Piwik account.

authMethods.name: API credentials (client ID and secret)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a client_id and client_secret pair generated in Piwik. These credentials are used to obtain a token that authenticates requests to the Piwik API.

setupSteps.title: Create API credentials in Piwik
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Piwik account and create an API key in your user profile. Give the key a name and confirm its creation.

setupSteps.title: Copy the client ID and client secret
setupSteps.body: After creating the key, copy both the Client ID and Client secret right away. They are not available after you close the window. These map to the connector's client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Provide your account identifier
setupSteps.body: Set organization_id to identify your Piwik account.

setupSteps.title: Enter credentials into the connector
setupSteps.body: Configure the connector with client_id, client_secret, and organization_id so it can authenticate to the Piwik API.

sources.title: Piwik PRO help center: Where can I find API credentials?
